hero.title: Breaking Energy Limits, Reshaping Electric Boundaries
hero.subtitle: High energy density, ultra-safe solid-state battery solutions

about.companyDesc: Swift Safe Energy (Shenzhen) Technology Co., Ltd. is a new energy technology enterprise dedicated to R&D and industrialization of high energy density, high safety advanced battery technology. Leveraging technical expertise from Beijing Institute of Technology and Shenzhen Automotive Research Institute, we have built a core technology system covering materials, cells, and systems, focused on breaking key bottlenecks in safety, reliability, and engineering applications of high-energy-density batteries.

safety.title: Ultra Safety
safety.desc: Solid-state technology eliminates liquid electrolyte, completely removing fire and explosion risks

energy.title: High Energy Density
energy.desc: Up to 570+ Wh/kg - breaking energy density limits for boundary applications

charging.desc: Advanced materials with intelligent thermal management for rapid charging

lifecycle.title: Long Cycle Life
lifecycle.desc: Over 500 charge cycles with minimal capacity degradation
